prompt: Create a vertical fantasy trading-card portrait of PONYO, an androgynous young human bound to a divine raven-like beast, shown in an extreme close-up with the human face filling the center and lower half of the frame. The character has pale warm skin, intense amber-gold eyes staring directly at the viewer, messy wet-looking black hair falling across the forehead, and a calm but ominous expression. A huge metallic bird skull and feathered helm wraps over the top and right side of the head, with layered bronze-gold feathers, sharp beak forms, etched texture, scratches, dark holes, and one glowing red-orange gemstone eye embedded near the brow. Add additional dark-gold raven heads, hooked beaks, and feather armor curling around the lower left and bottom edge, blending human and mythic creature into one half-human half-god silhouette. Use digital painting with high-detail fantasy aesthetics, cinematic chiaroscuro, black background, molten amber rim light, warm orange reflections, glowing embers, glossy metal highlights, and subtle skin texture. Composition should feel intimate, fated, and confrontational, like a premium collectible card; crop tightly so the face and divine beast nearly touch the edges. At the bottom center, place the visible title text "PONYO" in a large sharp gothic fantasy font, glowing pale gold, with pointed serifs and slight perspective. Color palette: dark charcoal, antique bronze, burnished gold, ember orange, and red gemstone accents. Avoid extra characters, borders, logos, watermarks, or additional text.
